title: Ubiquiti U-Cable-Patch-3M-RJ45-BL, UniFi Ethernet Patch Cable, 3m, Cat6, blue
category: Ubiquiti U-Cable-Patch-3M-RJ45-BL, UniFi Ethernet Patch Cable, 3m, Cat6, blue
description: UniFi Ethernet patch cable UC-PATCH-RJ45 blue color with length 3m is ideal for connecting (not only) UniFi devices in racks. Ultra thin design 3mm. Made in white, blue and black colour The cable has passed the certification test TIA-568-B.2 Cat6 Channel test by the Fluke
